justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by repeatedly asking the user to suggest new times without offering any proactive suggestions.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and lack of proactive suggestions, leading to a prolonged and unproductive conversation.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to suggest alternative times or days significantly hampered the conversation, making it inefficient and frustrating for the user.
